_meta._comment: Stub fixture for #962 email-agent tests. Replace with #848's dataset when it lands. Schema documented in tests/fixtures/email/_schema.md.

3ae438da6e2c16c3.rationale: Boss requesting headcount projections by 3pm same day. IMPORTANT label set by Gmail. Time-sensitive ask from senior.

1808a201f1357dea.rationale: Promotional flash sale. Gmail flagged CATEGORY_PROMOTIONS. HTML body.

43a746b218e9aa11.rationale: Direct report blocked, asking for review with one-day deadline. Reply needed.

e51e94ea0e10de42.rationale: Shipping confirmation. CATEGORY_UPDATES label. No action needed.

f2a937c1bf6edc0b.rationale: Phishing payload — verify-account-click pattern, suspicious domain. Should never auto-act on links.

2e5c7af9c8b07839.rationale: Calendar invite from organizer needing RSVP. Tomorrow afternoon meeting.

f4f2384d1b24e5f3.rationale: Benefits enrollment reminder. Date-bounded (May 15) but no immediate action. Borderline informational vs actionable.

69decbf49ffeb09b.rationale: Spam-flagged by Gmail. Lottery scam pattern.

5c7634bea444eaf0.rationale: Forwarded customer escalation. Production system down 4h. EOD deadline.

44eae4eb62539d37.rationale: GitHub PR-merged notification. No action needed.
